properties.name: keycloak.public-url
properties.description: Browser-accessible base URL of the Keycloak server (used to build Swagger UI OAuth2 authorize/token URLs). Defaults to http://localhost:8180 when running locally without Docker.

properties.name: member-service.base-url
properties.description: Base URL of the Member Service used to resolve the current member's domain UUID. Defaults to http://localhost:8081.
